trade.summary: The Stati Uniti is Israele's largest trading partner. The Stati Uniti-Israele Free Trade Agreement (1985) was the first FTA the Stati Uniti signed with any country. Bilateral trade spans technology, pharmaceuticals, diamonds, and defense. Stati Uniti tech giants (Intel, Google, Microsoft, Apple) have major R&D centers in Israele. Israele is among the top recipients of Stati Uniti foreign military financing.

diplomatic.summary: The Stati Uniti-Israele relationship is one of the most consequential bilateral partnerships in the world. The Stati Uniti provides Israele with $3.8 billion in annual military aid under a 10-year MOU. The relationship was tested by disagreements over Gaza policy under the Biden administration but remained fundamentally intact. The Trump administration returned to office in 2025 and adopted an even more strongly pro-Israele posture, supporting Israelei security operations and moving to further strengthen the alliance.
recent_incidents: Stati Uniti vetoed multiple UN ceasefire resolutions 2023-2024
Stati Uniti provided emergency military aid after October 7
Stati Uniti deployed carrier strike groups to deter regional escalation

military.summary: The closest military relationship Israele has with any country. The Stati Uniti provides $3.8 billion annually in Foreign Military Financing. Israele is a major non-NATO ally and has access to advanced Stati Uniti weapons systems. The two countries conduct joint exercises, share intelligence, and coordinate on regional security. The Stati Uniti deployed two carrier strike groups to the Eastern Mediterranean after October 7, 2023. The Iron Dome and other Israelei missile defense systems were co-developed with Stati Uniti funding.

financial.summary: Massive Stati Uniti investment in Israelei tech ecosystem. Stati Uniti venture capital dominates Israelei startup funding. Stati Uniti tech giants have major Israelei R&D operations. Israelei companies widely listed on NASDAQ and NYSE. The Stati Uniti provides both military and economic assistance.

energy.summary: Growing bilateral energy linkages as Israele develops its offshore gas fields. Stati Uniti energy companies involved in Israelei offshore development. Strategic alignment on energy security in the Eastern Mediterranean region.

scientific.summary: Among the strongest bilateral S&T relationships in the world. The Stati Uniti-Israele Binational Science Foundation and Binational Industrial R&D Foundation support hundreds of joint projects annually. Joint research spans defense, biotech, AI, semiconductors, and climate. Israelei researchers have deep ties to Stati Uniti universities.
